market_mechanism: A delta-neutral long-gamma pre-earnings position profits from realized volatility exceeding implied volatility, scaled across entry DPE and moneyness.
expected_effect: Net PnL is positive when realized vol exceeds IV paid, with entry timing and moneyness as levers.

validation_plan.notes: Delta grid across DPE and moneyness.

notes: Deterministic fixture. Not a trading recommendation.
